acquisition method: Mass spectra were acquired in a data-dependent manner
alkylation reagent: cysteine residues were blocked with 50 mM iodoacetamide buffer
cleavage agent: proteins were digested with trypsin (1:40 trypsin/protein; Promega)
collision energy: HCD fragmentation was performed at 30 of normalized collision energy
instrument: coupled via a nanoelectrospray ion source (Thermo Fisher Scientific) to a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled via a nanoelectrospray ion source
reduction reagent: diluted in PBS containing β-mercaptoethanol (0.3 μl/ml)
reduction concentration: diluted in PBS containing β-mercaptoethanol (0.3 μl/ml)
